title: au-btech-literature-review-agent
short_desc: An open-source agentic framework developed at Aarhus University to automate systematic literature reviews and deep research surveys while maintaining strict auditability, grounding, and reproducible citation loops.
blueprint_title: THE VISION: REPRODUCIBLE RESEARCH WITHOUT HALLUCINATIONS
blueprint_desc: Engineered a decoupled .NET 10 solution utilizing Mistral Large to parse and synthesize academic texts. To combat fabricated citations, the engine uses an isolated data capsule pattern that outputs a step-by-step process trace on every execution. It generates immediate, dual-column academic paper previews embedded with live empirical distribution graphs, mapping data points directly back to true source facts.
